name: USB Computer Mouse
description: You’ve successfully tracked down the peripheral mouse, a master of camouflage in this environment. Its low-profile, ergonomic silhouette is specifically designed to blend into the workspace, often disappearing beneath the 'gravity-fed' cable mess or the shadow of a nearby monitor. In a room where most hardware is open-circuit and exposed, this finished consumer device stands out by trying not to stand out at all. Finding it requires looking past the wires to recognize the specific matte-plastic 'hump' that signifies a human interface device.
